paragraphs.name: 风格描述
paragraphs.instruction: 一句话概括壁纸风格和氛围，营造画面感

paragraphs.name: 使用场景
paragraphs.instruction: 适合什么人群、什么心情、什么场景使用，描述搭配效果

paragraphs.name: 引导保存
paragraphs.instruction: 引导保存壁纸、关注获取更多，用温柔有感染力的语气

paragraphs.name: 话题标签
paragraphs.instruction: #壁纸 #手机壁纸 #锁屏 #壁纸分享 等

images.name: 壁纸图
images.background_prompt_template:
Masterpiece mobile wallpaper, best quality, ultra-detailed, 8K UHD resolution.

STYLE & AESTHETIC:
- {style} style with {color_scheme} color palette
- {visual_elements}
- Professional art direction, award-winning design

TECHNICAL QUALITY:
- Rendered in Unreal Engine 5 with Octane Render
- Cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, volumetric light effects
- Ultra-detailed, sharp focus, intricate textures
- Professional color grading, rich and vibrant colors

COMPOSITION:
- Perfect 9:16 vertical ratio for mobile screens
- Clean, uncluttered composition with visual balance
- Rule of thirds, depth and atmosphere
- Eye-catching yet elegant, modern and sophisticated

STRICT REQUIREMENTS:
- No text, no words, no letters, no logos
- Pure visual art, suitable for phone wallpaper
- High contrast, excellent visibility on screen

images.name: iPhone展示图
images.background_prompt_template:
Professional product photo of iPhone on subtle gradient photography background. The iPhone screen displays the reference wallpaper image exactly as provided, with iOS lock screen UI overlaid on top.

CRITICAL - SCREEN CONTENT (FOLLOW EXACTLY):
1. MUST use the provided reference wallpaper image AS-IS
2. DO NOT regenerate, modify, or recreate the wallpaper
3. The wallpaper must appear EXACTLY as shown in the reference
4. ONLY add iOS lock screen UI elements ON TOP of the reference
5. No changes to wallpaper colors, style, or composition

iOS 26 LOCK SCREEN UI (Liquid Glass design language):
- Dynamic Island: small black pill at top center
- Time '{lock_time}' large and bold, centered on screen, {ui_text_color} color, crisp and sharp
- Date '{lock_date}' below time in lighter weight, same {ui_text_color} color
- Two frosted glass pill-shaped buttons at bottom: flashlight (left), camera (right)
- Buttons use Liquid Glass effect: translucent frosted glass, subtle blur, tinted to complement wallpaper
- All UI text rendered sharp and legible, harmonious with wallpaper palette
- No notification banners, clean minimal lock screen

THE IPHONE DEVICE:
- iPhone 16 Pro Max, titanium frame with brushed finish
- Matte glass back, ceramic shield front
- Ultra-thin bezels, premium build quality

PROFESSIONAL PHOTOGRAPHY BACKGROUND:
- Subtle radial gradient from light gray to soft gray
- Clean studio environment, no distractions
- Soft shadows, professional lighting

9:16 vertical, sharp focus, photorealistic quality.

images.name: iPad展示图
images.background_prompt_template:
Professional product photo of iPad in landscape on subtle gradient photography background. The iPad screen displays the reference wallpaper image exactly as provided, with iOS lock screen UI overlaid on top.

CRITICAL - SCREEN CONTENT (FOLLOW EXACTLY):
1. MUST use the provided reference wallpaper image AS-IS
2. DO NOT regenerate, modify, or recreate the wallpaper
3. The wallpaper must appear EXACTLY as shown in the reference
4. ONLY add iOS lock screen UI elements ON TOP of the reference
5. No changes to wallpaper colors, style, or composition
- The wallpaper fills the entire screen edge to edge

iOS 26 LOCK SCREEN UI (Liquid Glass, landscape orientation):
- Time '{lock_time}' and date '{lock_date}' at top left area, SF Pro Display font, {ui_text_color} color, crisp and sharp
- Status bar at top right: WiFi, cellular signal, battery percentage, same {ui_text_color} color
- Two frosted glass pill-shaped buttons at bottom corners: flashlight (left), camera (right)
- Buttons use Liquid Glass effect: translucent frosted glass, subtle blur, tinted to complement wallpaper
- All UI text rendered sharp and legible, harmonious with wallpaper palette
- No widgets, clean minimal lock screen

THE IPAD DEVICE:
- iPad Pro 13-inch in landscape orientation
- Aluminum unibody with flat edges, thin black bezels
- Matte finish, premium build quality

PROFESSIONAL PHOTOGRAPHY BACKGROUND:
- Subtle radial gradient from light gray to soft gray (matches iPhone mockup style)
- Clean studio environment, no distractions
- Soft shadows, professional lighting

16:9 horizontal, sharp focus, photorealistic quality.

style.inference_prompt: Based on the topic '{topic}', identify the wallpaper style. Choose ONE from: minimalist, nature, gradient, abstract, geometric, floral, anime, landscape, urban, texture, clay, cute, character, stopmotion. Return ONLY the style name, no explanation.

color_scheme.inference_prompt: Based on the style '{style}', suggest a color scheme. Choose ONE from: soft pastel, vibrant, monochrome, earth tones, cool blue, warm sunset, forest green, ocean blue. Return ONLY the color scheme name, no explanation.

visual_elements.inference_prompt: Based on the topic '{topic}' and '{style}' style, describe 2-3 visual elements in simple English. For clay/cute/character styles with small figures, describe: tiny character and environment elements. For abstract styles, describe shapes and patterns. Return ONLY the description, max 20 words.

ui_text_color.inference_prompt: Based on the '{color_scheme}' color scheme, should the UI text be light or dark? If the scheme is 'soft pastel', 'warm sunset', 'vibrant', 'ocean blue' choose 'white'. If 'monochrome' or 'earth tones' choose 'black'. Return ONLY the color name: white or black.
